option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
server: address: 127.0.0.1 # overridden at runtime by LocalConfigPostProcessor port: 8080
app: ea: base-url: https://proclubs.ea.com/api/fc platform: common-gen5 club-id: "1104972" club-name: "Associação BF" match-type: leagueMatch # friendlyMatch | leagueMatch | playoffMatch max-result-count: 5 # EA's endpoint returns 403 without a browser-like User-Agent. # Verified by community projects. Change here if EA updates bot detection. user-agent: >- Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 # Gateway implementation: "playwright" (default) or "webclient" # Playwright uses a real headed Chromium browser to bypass Akamai's TLS # fingerprinting and JavaScript sensor. On Linux servers, launch with: # xvfb-run -a java -jar app.jar client: playwright playwright: headless: false nav-timeout-ms: 30000 fetch-timeout-ms: 30000 startup-retries: 1 initial-page-url: https://proclubs.ea.com
polling: enabled: true interval-ms: 60000 publish-existing-on-first-run: false
discord: webhook-url: "" # configured at runtime via /setup — never commit a real URL here
web: network-enabled: false # overridden by local config file at startup
logging: level: com.eafc26: INFO com.eafc26.discordstats.ea.EaResponseParser: WARN

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
server: address: 127.0.0.1 # overridden at runtime by LocalConfigPostProcessor port: 8080
app: ea: base-url: https://proclubs.ea.com/api/fc platform: common-gen5 club-id: "1104972" club-name: "Associação BF" match-type: leagueMatch # friendlyMatch | leagueMatch | playoffMatch max-result-count: 5 # EA's endpoint returns 403 without a browser-like User-Agent. # Verified by community projects. Change here if EA updates bot detection. user-agent: >- Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 # Gateway implementation: "playwright" (default) or "webclient" # Playwright uses a real headed Chromium browser to bypass Akamai's TLS # fingerprinting and JavaScript sensor. On Linux servers, launch with: # xvfb-run -a java -jar app.jar client: playwright playwright: headless: false nav-timeout-ms: 30000 fetch-timeout-ms: 30000 startup-retries: 1 initial-page-url: https://proclubs.ea.com
polling: enabled: true publish-existing-on-first-run: false
discord: webhook-url: "" # configured at runtime via /setup — never commit a real URL here
web: network-enabled: false # overridden by local config file at startup
logging: level: com.eafc26: INFO com.eafc26.discordstats.ea.EaResponseParser: WARN

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent

originalContent
